mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM application_case WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-01')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN fit_analysis_gate_result gr ON gr.fit_analysis_id = fa.id WHERE gr.gate_status = 'REVIEW_REQUIRED' AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id )
